summary: This document defines the software architecture for the AI Doctor & Patient Consultation Platform in compliance with IEC 62304:2006 medical device standards. It outlines system decomposition, security protocols including encryption and access control, and backup procedures across Heroku and Google Cloud services. Additionally, it specifies minimum user requirements, noting that patients only need a working telephone line.
